Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.toonation

Interface ToonationChatEventListener

public interface ToonationChatEventListener
Event listener for Toonation donation alert events.

Toonation emits donation alerts only and does not emit chat messages. Callbacks are invoked on internal WebSocket/network threads.

Since:
1.0.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    onBlocked(ToonationChat chat)
    Called when the alertbox is blocked by Toonation.
    default void
    onBroadcastEnd(ToonationChat chat)
    Called when Toonation indicates broadcast end semantics.
    default void
    onConnect(ToonationChat chat, boolean isReconnecting)
    Called after a WebSocket connection is established.
    default void
    onConnectionClosed(int code, String reason, boolean remote, boolean tryingToReconnect)
    Called when the connection is closed.
    default void
    onDonation(ToonationChat chat, ToonationDonationMessage msg)
    Called when a donation alert is received.
    default void
    onError(Exception ex)
    Called when an exception occurs in connection or parsing flow.

  • Method Details

    • onConnect

      default void onConnect(ToonationChat chat, boolean isReconnecting)
      Called after a WebSocket connection is established.

      Invoked on an internal WebSocket callback thread.

      Parameters:
      chat - active Toonation chat client
      isReconnecting - true if this connection is a reconnect

    • onConnectionClosed

      default void onConnectionClosed(int code, String reason, boolean remote, boolean tryingToReconnect)
      Called when the connection is closed.

      Invoked on an internal WebSocket callback thread.

      Parameters:
      code - close status code
      reason - close reason message
      remote - true if closure was initiated remotely
      tryingToReconnect - true if reconnect logic will run

    • onError

      default void onError(Exception ex)
      Called when an exception occurs in connection or parsing flow.

      Invoked on an internal WebSocket callback thread.

      Parameters:
      ex - raised exception

    • onDonation

      default void onDonation(ToonationChat chat, ToonationDonationMessage msg)
      Called when a donation alert is received.

      Invoked on an internal WebSocket callback thread.

      Parameters:
      chat - active Toonation chat client
      msg - parsed donation alert payload

    • onBroadcastEnd

      default void onBroadcastEnd(ToonationChat chat)
      Called when Toonation indicates broadcast end semantics.

      Invoked on an internal WebSocket callback thread.

      Parameters:
      chat - active Toonation chat client

    • onBlocked

      default void onBlocked(ToonationChat chat)
      Called when the alertbox is blocked by Toonation.

      Invoked on an internal WebSocket callback thread.

      Parameters:
      chat - active Toonation chat client
